get.summary:
Lists all backup restores for spaces in the account identified by the given ID.
Required permissions:
- read:serverless_backups

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description:
The identifier of the account (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

parameters.name: spaceId
parameters.description:
The identifier of the space (in GUID format).
When this field is set, only backup restores that belong to the space are returned.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description:
Maximum number of items to return.
If not specified, all items are returned.

parameters.name: pageToken
parameters.description:
A page token, received from a previous call.
Provide this to retrieve the subsequent page.
When paginating, all other parameters provided to the request must match
the call that provided the page token.

get.summary:
Lists all backup schedules in the account identified by the given ID.
Required permissions:
- read:serverless_backup_schedules

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description:
The identifier of the account (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

parameters.name: spaceId
parameters.description:
The identifier of the space (in GUID format).
When this field is set, only backup schedules that belong to the space are returned.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description:
Maximum number of items to return.
If not specified, all items are returned.

parameters.name: pageToken
parameters.description:
A page token, received from a previous call.
Provide this to retrieve the subsequent page.
When paginating, all other parameters provided to the request must match
the call that provided the page token.

get.summary:
Gets a backup schedule in the account identified by the given ID.
Required permissions:
- read:serverless_backup_schedules

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description:
The identifier of the account (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

parameters.name: backupScheduleId
parameters.description:
The identifier for the backup schedule (in GUID format).
This backup schedule should be part of the provided cluster and account.
This is a required field.

parameters.name: spaceId
parameters.description:
The identifier for the space (in GUID format).
This space should be part of the provided account.
This is a required field.

delete.summary:
Deletes a backup schedule in the account identified by the given ID.
Required permissions:
- delete:serverless_backup_schedules

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description:
The identifier of the account (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

parameters.name: backupScheduleId
parameters.description:
The identifier for the backup schedule (in GUID format).
This backup schedule should be part of the provided account.
This is a required field.

parameters.name: deleteBackups
parameters.description: If set, the backups generated by this backup schedule will be deleted as well.

get.summary:
Lists all backups in the account identified by the given ID.
Required permissions:
- read:serverless_backups

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description:
The identifier of the account (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

parameters.name: spaceId
parameters.description:
The identifier of the space (in GUID format).
When this field is set, only backups that belong to the space are returned.

parameters.name: backupScheduleId
parameters.description:
The identifier of the schedule (in GUID format).
When this field is set, only backups triggered by the backup schedule are returned.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description:
Maximum number of items to return.
If not specified, all items are returned.

parameters.name: pageToken
parameters.description:
A page token, received from a previous call.
Provide this to retrieve the subsequent page.
When paginating, all other parameters provided to the request must match
the call that provided the page token.

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description:
The identifier of the account (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

parameters.name: backupId
parameters.description:

This is a required field.

delete.summary:
Deletes a backup in the account identified by the given ID.

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description:
The identifier of the account (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

parameters.name: backupId

post.summary:
Restores a backup to its original space.
Required permissions:
- restore:serverless_backups

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description:
The identifier of the account (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

parameters.name: backupId
parameters.description:
The identifier of the backup (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

post.summary:
Creates a backup for the cluster identified by the given ID.
Required permissions:
- write:serverless_backups

parameters.name: backup.accountId
parameters.description:
The identifier of the account (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

post.summary:
Creates a backup schedule in the account identified by the given ID.
Required permissions:
- write:serverless_backup_schedules

parameters.name: backupSchedule.accountId
parameters.description:
The identifier of the account (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

put.summary:
Updates a backup schedule in the account identified by the given ID.
Required permissions:
- write:serverless_backup_schedules

parameters.name: backupSchedule.accountId
parameters.description:
The identifier of the account (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

parameters.name: backupSchedule.id
parameters.description:
Unique identifier for the backup schedule (in GUID format).
This is a read-only field and will be available after a backup schedule is created.

id.description:
Unique identifier for the backup (in GUID format).
This is a read-only field and will be available after a backup is created.

createdAt.description:
The timestamp when the backup was created.
This is a read-only field and will be available after a backup is created.

spaceId.description:
The identifier of the space (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

name.description:
The name of the backup.
This is a read-only field and will be available after a backup is created.

status.description:
The current status of the backup.
This is a read-only field and will be set after CreateBackup is called.

deletedAt.description:
The timestamp when the backup was deleted (or when deletion started).
This is a read-only field and will be set after DeleteBackup is called.

backupDuration.description:
The total time taken to generate the backup. This is a read-only field and
will be available after the backup process is completed, regardless of
whether it succeeded or failed.

backupScheduleId.description:
The identifier of the backup schedule (in GUID format).
This is a read-only field and will be present if the backup was created by a backup schedule.

retentionPeriod.description:
The retention period in seconds for the backup. After that period, the backup is deleted from the system.
The value should be between 1 day (>= 86400 seconds) and 365 days (<= 31536000 seconds).
If the value is unset, backups will be retained indefinitely.

spaceInfo.description:
Space details associated with the backup.
Identity fields reflect the latest space state; configuration reflects the state at backup time.
This is a read-only field and will be available after the backup is created.

createdBy.description:
The caller who created the backup.
This is a read-only field and will be available after a backup is created.

lastUpdatedBy.description:
The caller who last updated the backup.
This is a read-only field and will be set when backup metadata is updated.

deletedBy.description:
The caller who initiated deletion of the backup.
This is a read-only field and will be set when deleted_at is set.

BackupServiceCreateBackupBody.description: CreateBackupRequest is the request for the CreateBackup function.

id.description:
Unique identifier for the backup schedule (in GUID format).
This is a read-only field and will be available after a backup schedule is created.

createdAt.description:
The timestamp when the backup schedule was created.
This is a read-only field and will be available after a backup schedule is created.

spaceId.description:
The identifier of the space (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

name.description:
Name of the backup schedule.
This is a required field.
Name can only contain letters, numbers, spaces, underscores and dashes.

schedule.description:
The schedule that determines when the backup will be created.
This field follows the standard crontab format: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cron#Overview
This is a required field.

retentionPeriod.description:
The retention period in seconds for the backup. After that period, the backup is deleted from the system.
The value should be between 1 day (>= 86400 seconds) and 365 days (<= 31536000 seconds).
If the value is unset, backup will be retained indefinitely.

deletedAt.description:
The timestamp when the backup schedule was deleted (or when deletion started).
This is a read-only field and will be set after DeleteBackupSchedule is called.

status.description: The current status of the backup schedule.

createdBy.description:
The caller who created the backup schedule.
This is a read-only field and will be available after a backup schedule is created.

lastUpdatedBy.description:
The caller who last updated the backup schedule.
This is a read-only field and will be set after UpdateBackupSchedule is called.

deletedBy.description:
The caller who initiated deletion of the backup schedule.
This is a read-only field and will be set when deleted_at is set.

BackupServiceCreateBackupScheduleBody.description: CreateBackupScheduleRequest is the request for the CreateBackupSchedule function.

updateMask.description:
Optional mask of fields to update. When set, only the fields listed in
the mask will be updated; all other fields retain their current values
on the server. Field paths reference the resource (BackupSchedule)
message, not the request envelope (e.g. "schedule").
When unset or empty, the request is treated as a full-resource
replacement (the existing behavior).

BackupServiceUpdateBackupScheduleBody.description: UpdateBackupScheduleRequest is the request for the UpdateBackupSchedule function.

v1ActorType.description:
ActorType specifies the type of actor that can call a method.

 - ACTOR_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED: Default, unspecified actor type. Should generally not be used explicitly in options
unless to signify an error or uninitialized state.
 - ACTOR_TYPE_USER: Represents a human user, typically authenticated via an identity provider (Auth0).
 - ACTOR_TYPE_MANAGEMENT_KEY: Represents a programmatic access key, also called management key,
that is not be tied to a specific user or service account identity, but rather an account.
 - ACTOR_TYPE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT: Represents a service account or machine user, often used for M2M communication.
This is for internal platform use only.

v1Backup.description: A Backup represents a backup of a Qdrant serverless space.

id.description: Unique identifier for the backup restore (in GUID format).

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the backup restore was created.

accountId.description: The identifier of the account (in GUID format).

spaceId.description: The identifier of the space (in GUID format).

backupId.description: The Identifier of the backup (in GUID format).

status.description: The current status of the backup restore.

deletedAt.description: The timestamp when the backup restore was deleted (or when deletion started).

v1BackupRestore.description:
A BackupRestore represents the status of an in-place backup restore for a space.
All fields in this message are read-only.

v1BackupRestoreStatus.description:
BackupRestoreStatus represents the current status of a backup restore.

 - BACKUP_RESTORE_STATUS_UNSPECIFIED: The status is unknown or not specified. This is the default value.
 - BACKUP_RESTORE_STATUS_RUNNING: The backup restore is running.
 - BACKUP_RESTORE_STATUS_FAILED: The backup restore failed to complete successfully.
 - BACKUP_RESTORE_STATUS_SUCCEEDED: The backup restore completed successfully.
 - BACKUP_RESTORE_STATUS_FAILED_TO_SYNC: There was an error syncing the backup restore in the cluster's region.
 - BACKUP_RESTORE_STATUS_NOT_FOUND: The backup restore is missing in the cluster's region.
 - BACKUP_RESTORE_STATUS_SKIPPED: The backup restore is skipped.

id.description:
Unique identifier for the backup schedule (in GUID format).
This is a read-only field and will be available after a backup schedule is created.

createdAt.description:
The timestamp when the backup schedule was created.
This is a read-only field and will be available after a backup schedule is created.

accountId.description:
The identifier of the account (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

spaceId.description:
The identifier of the space (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

name.description:
Name of the backup schedule.
This is a required field.
Name can only contain letters, numbers, spaces, underscores and dashes.

schedule.description:
The schedule that determines when the backup will be created.
This field follows the standard crontab format: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cron#Overview
This is a required field.

retentionPeriod.description:
The retention period in seconds for the backup. After that period, the backup is deleted from the system.
The value should be between 1 day (>= 86400 seconds) and 365 days (<= 31536000 seconds).
If the value is unset, backup will be retained indefinitely.

deletedAt.description:
The timestamp when the backup schedule was deleted (or when deletion started).
This is a read-only field and will be set after DeleteBackupSchedule is called.

status.description: The current status of the backup schedule.

createdBy.description:
The caller who created the backup schedule.
This is a read-only field and will be available after a backup schedule is created.

lastUpdatedBy.description:
The caller who last updated the backup schedule.
This is a read-only field and will be set after UpdateBackupSchedule is called.

deletedBy.description:
The caller who initiated deletion of the backup schedule.
This is a read-only field and will be set when deleted_at is set.

v1BackupSchedule.description: A BackupSchedule represents a recurring schedule for creating backups.

v1BackupScheduleStatus.description:
BackupScheduleStatus represents the current status of a backup schedule.

 - BACKUP_SCHEDULE_STATUS_UNSPECIFIED: The status is unknown or not specified. This is the default value.
 - BACKUP_SCHEDULE_STATUS_ACTIVE: The backup schedule is active and functioning correctly.
 - BACKUP_SCHEDULE_STATUS_FAILED_TO_SYNC: There was an error syncing the backup schedule in the cluster's region.
 - BACKUP_SCHEDULE_STATUS_NOT_FOUND: The backup schedule is missing in the cluster's region.
 - BACKUP_SCHEDULE_STATUS_DISABLED: The backup schedule is disabled.

v1BackupStatus.description:
BackupStatus represents the current status of a backup operation.

 - BACKUP_STATUS_UNSPECIFIED: The status is unknown or not specified. This is the default value.
 - BACKUP_STATUS_RUNNING: The backup is currently in progress.
 - BACKUP_STATUS_SKIPPED: The backup was skipped or was not started because it has no suitable target.
 - BACKUP_STATUS_FAILED: The backup failed to complete successfully.
 - BACKUP_STATUS_SUCCEEDED: The backup completed successfully.
 - BACKUP_STATUS_FAILED_TO_SYNC: There was an error syncing the backup in the cluster's region.
 - BACKUP_STATUS_NOT_FOUND: The backup was expected but not found in the cluster's region.

actorId.description: Unique identifier of the actor (user UUID, management-key id, service-account id, …).

userAgent.description:
HTTP User-Agent of the client that initiated the request, when available.
Omitted for internal/service-initiated actions without a client User-Agent.

v1Caller.description: Caller identifies the authenticated actor that performed an action on a resource.

v1CreateBackupResponse.description: CreateBackupResponse is the response from the CreateBackup function.

v1CreateBackupScheduleResponse.description: CreateBackupScheduleResponse is the response from the CreateBackupSchedule function.

v1DeleteBackupResponse.description:
DeleteBackupResponse is the response from the DeleteBackup function.

Empty

v1DeleteBackupScheduleResponse.description:
DeleteBackupScheduleResponse is the response from the DeleteBackupSchedule function.

Empty

v1GetBackupResponse.description: GetBackupResponse is the response from the GetBackup function.

v1GetBackupScheduleResponse.description: GetBackupScheduleResponse is the response from the GetBackupSchedule function.

items.description: The actual backup restores in this list.

totalSize.description:
The total number of items available (useful in relation with pagination).
This field is fill out when pagination is used (aka in the request `page_size` was provided).

nextPageToken.description:
A token that can be sent as `page_token` to retrieve the next page.
If this field is omitted, there are no subsequent pages.

v1ListBackupRestoresResponse.description: ListBackupRestoresResponse is the response from the ListBackupRestores function.

items.description: The actual backup schedules in this list.

totalSize.description:

This field is fill out when pagination is used (aka in the request `page_size` was provided).

nextPageToken.description:
A token that can be sent as `page_token` to retrieve the next page.
If this field is omitted, there are no subsequent pages.

v1ListBackupSchedulesResponse.description: ListBackupsResponse is the response from the ListBackups function.

items.description:
The actual backups in this list.
When pagination is used it contains a single page only, not all items.

totalSize.description:
The total number of items available (useful in relation with pagination).
This field is fill out when pagination is used (aka in the request `page_size` was provided).

nextPageToken.description:
A token that can be sent as `page_token` to retrieve the next page.
If this field is omitted, there are no subsequent pages.

v1ListBackupsResponse.title: ListBackupsResponse is the response from the ListBackups function

v1RestoreBackupResponse.description:
RestoreBackupResponse is the response from the RestoreBackup function.

Empty

lastModifiedAt.description:
Timestamp when the space configuration was last updated.
This is a read-only field and will be available after a space is created.

allowedIpSourceRanges.description:
List of allowed IP source ranges for this space.
This is an optional field.
The CIDRs supports IPv4 only.

v1SpaceConfiguration.description: A SpaceConfiguration represents the configuration of a space in the Qdrant serverless environment.

name.description: The latest name of the space that this backup was taken from.

cloudProviderId.description:
Cloud provider where the space is hosted.
Must match one of the provider IDs returned by the `qdrant.cloud.platform.v1.PlatformService.ListCloudProviders` method.

cloudProviderRegionId.description:
Cloud provider region where the space is hosted.
Must match one of the region IDs returned by the `qdrant.cloud.platform.v1.PlatformService.ListCloudProviderRegions` method.

configuration.description: The space configuration at the time of backup.

v1SpaceInfo.description:
Represents the space details associated with a backup.
The identity fields (name, cloud_provider_id, cloud_provider_region_id) reflect the latest space state.
The configuration field is immutable and represents the values at backup time.

v1UpdateBackupScheduleResponse.description: UpdateBackupScheduleResponse is the response from the UpdateBackupSchedule function.
